notes: Each rejected branch was captured against a disposable product with Color/Size options.
atomicNoWrite compares before/after product reads and must remain true for each captured rejection.

userErrors.message: Price must be greater than or equal to 0
Weight must be greater than or equal to 0
Inventory quantity must be less than or equal to 1000000000
SKU is too long (maximum is 255 characters)
Barcode is too long (maximum is 255 characters)
Option value name is too long

errors.message: The input array size of 2049 is greater than the maximum allowed of 2048.
